name: Friday Deploy
description: Deploying on Friday is a cry for help.

name: Weekend Deploy
description: You're working weekends? That's the real incident.

name: Monday Deploy
description: Monday deploys: testing fate when you're least prepared.

name: Pre-Coffee Deploy
description: Deploying before your first coffee is clinical insanity.

name: Lunch Hour Deploy
description: Post-lunch deploys: fueled by false confidence and carbs.

name: End of Day Deploy
description: Deploying at 4 PM means debugging at 7 PM.

name: After Hours Deploy
description: After 5 PM, every deploy is a personal choice with professional consequences.

name: Holiday Freeze
description: The code freeze exists to protect you from yourself.

name: Quarter End
description: Finance is running reports. Don't give them new numbers to explain.

name: April Fools Day
description: Nobody will believe the incident report.

name: Large Changeset
description: The bigger the diff, the bigger the boom.

name: Missing Tests
description: No tests? That's not confidence, that's denial.

name: Self-Approved PR
description: Reviewing your own code is like grading your own exam.

name: New Dependency
description: Every new package is a trust fall with the open-source community.
